ques: Look up the current standings for the NBA Eastern Conference on ESPN.
Check the latest articles on ESPN for updates on any trades that occurred in the NBA within the past 2 days.
Show the scores and main highlight of the Milwaukee Bucks game that took place within the last 2 days on ESPN.
Retrieve the final score from the most recent NBA game broadcast on ESPN, including the playing teams' names and the date of the match.
Check ESPN for the final scores of NBA games that were played yesterday.
Identify the top scorer in the NBA from the latest completed game and note down the points scored, the team they play for, and their position on the team.
Find the result of the latest basketball game between the Los Angeles Lakers and the Boston Celtics, including the final score and top scorer from the match.
Retrieve the final score and a brief summary of the latest NBA game played by the Los Angeles Lakers as reported on ESPN.
Find information on ESPN about the top three scoring leaders in the NBA as of the last day of the regular season, and note which teams they play for.
Search on ESPN for how many teams have Los Angeles in their name and how many of them are NBA.

How many NBA teams are there and list all the teams with 'New' in their name.
